# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0abcdef1234567890  # Replace with your desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro           # Replace with your desired instance type
      KeyName: my-key-pair            # Replace with your key pair name
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: subnet-0123456789abcdef0  # Replace with your subnet ID

  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a  # Replace with your desired availability zone
      Size: 20                      # Replace with your desired volume size in GiB
      VolumeType: gp2               # Replace with your desired volume type

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH and HTTP access
      VpcId: vpc-0123456789abcdef0   # Replace with your VPC ID
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  VolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref EBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdh              # Replace with your desired device name
